description: Search FDA drug recall enforcement records — keyless, offline-cacheable, agent-native. Reports FDA facts only; never says a drug is safe.

novel_features.name: Recall check by drug
novel_features.description: Find active FDA recalls that mention a drug, optionally filtered to the most serious class.

novel_features.name: Recalls by firm
novel_features.description: List every recall attributed to a recalling firm or manufacturer.

novel_features.name: Recent recalls window
novel_features.description: List recalls initiated in the last N days, most recent first.

novel_features.name: Recall detail by number
novel_features.description: Show full detail for a single recall number, with the FDA class legend.
